description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push to master and dev-gha branches and on pull requests to master. Use a test job matrix that runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13, installing dependencies, running tests with pytest and coverage, and optionally installing diagrams and mypy dependencies. Also run a finish job that completes the Coveralls parallel job.
